data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Two ACs are OPERATIONAL live-verifications the code-reading completion-verifier cannot see (it searched the repo, found no artifact). Both were performed live this session against production: (1) python -m rebar.mirror_guard --all -> exit 0, replication in sync + ruleset 'locked (deploy-key-only)'; (2) simulated drift = added a RepositoryRole(admin) bypass to ruleset 18402431 -> guardian exit 1 'bypass_actors must be DeployKey-only, found [DeployKey, RepositoryRole]' -> reverted to DeployKey-only -> exit 0; terraform plan re-confirmed 'No changes'. Code + 25 tests landed on main via Gerrit change 123 (d96628c9). Force-closing: operational ACs are not code-verifiable.". Session: d96628c9.
